requirement_topic.en: DFFE ODS Refrigerant Controls — Import Permit and Phase-Out Obligations
requirement_topic.zh: DFFE臭氧耗损物质制冷剂管控——进口许可及淘汰义务
requirement_topic.zht: DFFE臭氧耗損物質製冷劑管控——進口許可及淘汰義務

summary.en: South Africa's Department of Forestry, Fisheries and Environment (DFFE) administers controls on ozone-depleting substances (ODS) and F-gases under the Ozone-Depleting Substances Regulations (promulgated under the National Environmental Management: Air Quality Act, Act 39 of 2004) and South Africa's obligations under the Montreal Protocol. Import of equipment containing controlled ODS refrigerants (including R-22 / HCFC-22) requires a valid ODS import permit from DFFE. South Africa is a developing-country party to the Montreal Protocol and is phasing out HCFC refrigerants (R-22) under its HCFC Phase-out Management Plan (HPMP). Heat pump products using R-22 or other controlled refrigerants cannot be legally imported without the required DFFE permit, and R-22-based products face increasing import restrictions as phase-down progresses. Lower-GWP HFC refrigerants (R-410A, R-32) and natural refrigerants are acceptable where equipment meets South African safety standards, but their use in equipment must be declared.
summary.zh: 南非环境林业渔业部（DFFE）依据《国家环境管理：空气质量法》（2004年第39号法案）颁布的《臭氧耗损物质法规》及南非在《蒙特利尔议定书》下的义务，对臭氧耗损物质（ODS）和含氟气体实施管控。进口含受控臭氧耗损物质制冷剂（包括R-22/HCFC-22）的设备须持有DFFE签发的有效臭氧耗损物质进口许可证。南非作为《蒙特利尔议定书》发展中国家缔约方，正依据其HCFC淘汰管理计划（HPMP）逐步淘汰HCFC制冷剂（R-22）。使用R-22或其他受控制冷剂的热泵产品若无DFFE所需许可证则不得合法进口，且随着淘汰进程推进，以R-22为制冷剂的产品将面临日益严格的进口限制。低全球变暖潜值HFC制冷剂（R-410A、R-32）和天然制冷剂在设备满足南非安全标准的前提下可接受，但其在设备中的使用须如实申报。
summary.zht: 南非環境林業漁業部（DFFE）依據《國家環境管理：空氣質量法》（2004年第39號法案）頒布的《臭氧耗損物質法規》及南非在《蒙特利爾議定書》下的義務，對臭氧耗損物質（ODS）和含氟氣體實施管控。進口含受控臭氧耗損物質製冷劑（包括R-22/HCFC-22）的設備須持有DFFE簽發的有效臭氧耗損物質進口許可證。南非作為《蒙特利爾議定書》發展中國家締約方，正依據其HCFC淘汰管理計畫（HPMP）逐步淘汰HCFC製冷劑（R-22）。使用R-22或其他受控製冷劑的熱泵產品若無DFFE所需許可證則不得合法進口，且隨著淘汰進程推進，以R-22為製冷劑的產品將面臨日益嚴格的進口限制。低全球暖化潛值HFC製冷劑（R-410A、R-32）和天然製冷劑在設備滿足南非安全標準的前提下可接受，但其在設備中的使用須如實申報。

standards_or_laws: Ozone-Depleting Substances Regulations (GN R 397 of 2012, as amended), South Africa
National Environmental Management: Air Quality Act (Act 39 of 2004), South Africa
Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer — HCFC Phase-out Management Plan (HPMP)
SANS 60335-2-40 — refrigerant safety provisions for heat pump AC equipment

summary.en: China's refrigerant safety baseline for heat pumps and air conditioners is addressed through GB 9237 (safety standard for refrigerating systems and heat pumps) and GB 25454 (heat pump units, referencing permitted refrigerants). China is also a Montreal Protocol party and has implemented R-22 phase-out obligations, but domestic phase-out schedules and import/export permit requirements differ from South Africa's DFFE permit regime. Chinese R-410A or R-32 products still require refrigerant type declaration upon import into South Africa.
summary.zh: 中国热泵和空调器制冷剂安全基准通过GB 9237（制冷系统和热泵安全标准）和GB 25454（热泵机组，引用允许使用的制冷剂）加以规范。中国同为《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方，已落实R-22淘汰义务，但国内淘汰时间表和进出口许可要求与南非DFFE许可制度不同。中国R-410A或R-32产品进口南非时仍须申报制冷剂类型。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵和空調器製冷劑安全基準通過GB 9237（製冷系統和熱泵安全標準）和GB 25454（熱泵機組，引用允許使用的製冷劑）加以規範。中國同為《蒙特利爾議定書》締約方，已落實R-22淘汰義務，但國內淘汰時間表和進出口許可要求與南非DFFE許可制度不同。中國R-410A或R-32產品進口南非時仍須申報製冷劑類型。

standards_or_laws: GB 9237 — Safety of refrigerating systems and heat pumps
China's HCFC Phase-Out Management Plan under the Montreal Protocol

gap.en: R-22 (HCFC-22) heat pump products require a DFFE ODS import permit and face progressively tightening import restrictions under South Africa's HPMP. Exporters must confirm the refrigerant type in the unit, check current DFFE ODS import permit requirements, and ensure refrigerant type is declared in import documentation. Products using low-GWP HFC refrigerants (R-410A, R-32) should also confirm that safety standards compliance (SANS 60335-2-40) covers the specific refrigerant used. Chinese domestic phase-out schedules and GB 9237 compliance do not substitute for DFFE permit requirements.
gap.zh: 含R-22（HCFC-22）的热泵产品须持有DFFE臭氧耗损物质进口许可证，且在南非HPMP框架下面临日益收紧的进口限制。出口商须确认设备中使用的制冷剂类型，核查DFFE当前臭氧耗损物质进口许可要求，并确保在进口文件中申报制冷剂类型。使用低全球变暖潜值HFC制冷剂（R-410A、R-32）的产品还须确认安全标准符合性（SANS 60335-2-40）涵盖所使用的特定制冷剂。中国国内淘汰时间表及GB 9237合规不能替代DFFE许可要求。
gap.zht: 含R-22（HCFC-22）的熱泵產品須持有DFFE臭氧耗損物質進口許可證，且在南非HPMP框架下面臨日益收緊的進口限制。出口商須確認設備中使用的製冷劑類型，核查DFFE當前臭氧耗損物質進口許可要求，並確保在進口文件中申報製冷劑類型。使用低全球暖化潛值HFC製冷劑（R-410A、R-32）的產品還須確認安全標準符合性（SANS 60335-2-40）涵蓋所使用的特定製冷劑。中國國內淘汰時間表及GB 9237合規不能替代DFFE許可要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DFFE ODS import permit required for equipment containing controlled ODS refrigerants (including R-22); refrigerant type declaration required for all imports
mandatory_status.cn: R-22 subject to phase-out obligations under Montreal Protocol; GB 9237 governs domestic refrigerant safety; Chinese ODS schedules not equivalent to DFFE permit requirements

source.publisher: Department of Forestry, Fisheries and Environment (DFFE), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Significant gap for R-22 products — DFFE ODS import permit is mandatory and R-22 imports face progressive restrictions under HPMP. All exported units require refrigerant type declaration; Chinese GB 9237 compliance does not substitute for DFFE permit obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-22产品存在重大差距——DFFE臭氧耗损物质进口许可为强制性，R-22进口在HPMP框架下面临逐步收紧的限制。所有出口机组须申报制冷剂类型；中国GB 9237合规不能替代DFFE许可义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-22產品存在重大差距——DFFE臭氧耗損物質進口許可為強制性，R-22進口在HPMP框架下面臨逐步收緊的限制。所有出口機組須申報製冷劑類型；中國GB 9237合規不能替代DFFE許可義務。
